title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Care Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Care Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!
